page: Vultr vc2-1c-0.5gb-v6 is an entry-level virtual machine belonging to the Cloud Compute family. It features a single shared vCPU based on the Intel x86_64 architecture, configured with one physical core and one thread. The system is equipped with 0.5 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 0.5 GB per core.

For local storage, the instance includes a bundled 10 GB NVMe SSD, providing high-speed read and write capabilities relative to traditional storage media. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this configuration, which may require additional network setup or IPv6 utilization depending on deployment requirements.

This server type is designed for high resource density and qualitative cost efficiency, making it suitable for budget-conscious deployments where continuous high CPU utilization is not required. Due to the shared CPU allocation and limited memory capacity of 0.5 GB, this instance is best suited for lightweight workloads such as basic web serving, development environments, microservices, or simple utility scripts.
description: The Vultr vc2-1c-0.5gb-v6 is an entry-level virtual server within the Cloud Compute family, designed for budget-conscious and low-intensity workloads. It features a single shared Intel x86_64 vCPU with one physical core and one thread. The instance is configured with 0.5 GB of system memory and includes a bundled 10 GB NVMe SSD for local storage. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given the shared CPU allocation and highly constrained memory capacity, this server is optimized for qualitative cost efficiency rather than raw performance. It is best suited for lightweight applications, including basic web serving, microservices, development testing, and simple automation scripts that do not require sustained compute resources or large memory footprints.
og_description: Vultr vc2-1c-0.5gb-v6 is an entry-level Cloud Compute instance featuring a shared Intel x86_64 vCPU, 0.5 GB of RAM, and a 10 GB NVMe SSD, optimized for budget-friendly, lightweight workloads.

tagline: An entry-level virtual server featuring a shared Intel processor and NVMe storage for highly budget-conscious, lightweight applications.
bullet_points: Single shared Intel x86_64 vCPU for basic processing needs
0.5 GB of system memory suitable for lightweight tasks
Bundled 10 GB NVMe SSD local storage
